action: Distinguish browser audio rendering evidence from output-device routing evidence.

progress.finding: Render progress and AudioContext running state do not identify the hardware output route. AudioContext sinkId, setSinkId(), sinkchange, and speaker-selection policy provide a separate browser-visible evidence layer.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

handoff: Vercel Studio should pair R-001 render-position evidence with this routing classifier. On browsers without AudioContext output-selection support, report routing as unsupported rather than inferred. Even selected-confirmed remains insufficient without device-level acoustic or listener evidence.
limits: W3C Web Audio 1.1 is a draft.
Browser-visible route selection does not prove physical sound emission or perception.
No target-browser runtime or iPhone device test was available in this run.
